reasoning: This workout targets your lactate clearance limiter by incorporating over-under intervals. Your last ride on the Ocean Lava Cliffside Loop was a moderate aerobic effort. Today's focus will help improve your ability to maintain power on sustained climbs like the key segment in the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 4x 8-min over-unders: 6 mins at 209-218W, 2 mins at 242-256W with 2-min easy spin between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
